last_safe_checkpoint.description: Validated prompt-specific daemon progress logs, per-prompt reset behavior, and the updated operator docs.

bootstrap.goal: Write daemonize debug progress logs to a progress directory beside the configured result directory and reset the log for each new prompt session.

task_sync.resume_checkpoint: Implementation and targeted validation are complete. Resume from commit preparation unless a follow-up changes prompt-specific daemon log placement or rotation rules.

items.text: Phase 2. Reset each prompt-specific progress log whenever its prompt session starts
Phase 3. Lock the new daemon logging behavior with regression tests and documentation updates

next_action: Await direction on whether to prepare a commit for the prompt-specific daemon progress-log naming change.
notes: Resume from commit preparation unless a higher-priority daemon logging change is requested.
Daemonize debug logging now writes to <result_path>/../progress/<prompt>_progress.log instead of a shared progress filename.
Each daemon prompt session recreates its own prompt-specific progress log before writing fresh stderr progress.
Validation passed for tests.test_daemon and tests.test_cli.
